document_api_meta.title: Search CAP Affiliate Orders
document_api_meta.env_desc: Search the list of affiliate orders of the specified date range from a MCN or known as CAP - Creator Agency partner

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The partner access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 3. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3978f4c20311b8b555) to get partner access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: page_size
request_query_param.desc: The default is 20, it must be positive integer, the range is 1-100

request_query_param.name: category_asset_cipher
request_query_param.desc: The partner identifier used in API requests. Retrieve this value by using the [Get Authorized Category Assets API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/666012dd609d4402cc3be995).

request_body_param.name: settle_status
request_body_param.desc:
Settlement Status of the order.
Possible values:
1. "CUSTOMER UNPAID",  customer hasn't paid for the orders.
2. "PENDING", customers can still return or get a refund for this order. The earnings shown are estimates and waiting for settlement.
3. "SETTLED", your earnings have already settled to your account
4. "INELIGIBLE", The order has been returned/refunded/canceled by the buyer, and no commission will be settled.
5. "FROZEN", Possible fraud has been detected regarding the order. The commission will be unfrozen after the fraud is resolved.

request_body_param.name: create_time_ge
request_body_param.desc:
Filter orders to show only those that are created on or after the specified date and time. Unix timestamp.
Please note that we only support 3 months' data at maximum for each single request.
Note:
`create_time_ge` and `create_time_lt` together constitute the creation time filter condition.
`create_time_ge` and `create_time_lt` must be provided together. If both are not specified, data from the last three months will be queried by default.

request_body_param.name: create_time_lt
request_body_param.desc: Unix timestamp representing the end of transactions time range one wants to request

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: request_id
response_param.desc: Request log

response_param.name: data
response_param.desc: Specific return information

response_param.name: ^sku_orders
response_param.desc: Order list

response_param.name: ^^id
response_param.desc: Transaction main order ID

response_param.name: ^^tags
response_param.desc: The customizable ID for each order, used for tracking performance at difference front end modules.

response_param.name: ^^create_time
response_param.desc: Time and date of order created, UTC+0 timing

response_param.name: ^^delivery_time
response_param.desc: Time and date order delivered, UTC+0 timing

response_param.name: ^^settle_status
response_param.desc:
Settlement Status of the order.
Possible values:
1. "CUSTOMER UNPAID",  customer hasn't paid for the orders.
2. "PENDING", customers can still return or get a refund for this order. The earnings shown are estimates and waiting for settlement.
3. "SETTLED", your earnings have already settled to your account
4. "INELIGIBLE", The order has been returned/refunded/canceled by the buyer, and no commission will be settled.
5. "FROZEN", Possible fraud has been detected regarding the order. The commission will be unfrozen after the fraud is resolved.

response_param.name: ^^sku_id
response_param.desc: The SKU identifier.

response_param.name: ^^open_collaboration_id
response_param.desc: The open collaboration identifier associated with the order.

response_param.name: ^^target_collaboration_id
response_param.desc: The target collaboration identifier associated with the order.

response_param.name: ^^creator_username
response_param.desc: Creator username

response_param.name: ^^product_name
response_param.desc: Product name / description

response_param.name: ^^product_id
response_param.desc: Unique identifier for Product

response_param.name: ^^price
response_param.desc: The SKU selling price information

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: Price amount for product, such as USD 1000

response_param.name: ^^^currency
response_param.desc: Type of currency use

response_param.name: ^^quantity
response_param.desc: Total sku quantity per order

response_param.name: ^^shop_name
response_param.desc: Shop / Seller name

response_param.name: ^^content_type
response_param.desc:
The content format of the creator content through which the order was created.
Possible values:
- SHOP
- VIDEO
- LIVE
- PRE_LIVE
- PROMOTION_PAGE
- LINKSHARE

response_param.name: ^^content_id
response_param.desc: Unique identifier for content

response_param.name: ^^attribution_type
response_param.desc:
Direct: Orders placed when customers click on links creators shared and buy from the shop. The commission rate is higher than indirect attribution.
Indirect: Orders placed from the Recommendations page through links creators shared. The commission rate is lower than direct attribution.

response_param.name: ^^commission_model
response_param.desc: Determine order commission be calculated based on fixed commission model or tiering commission model

response_param.name: ^^commission_tier_setting
response_param.desc: Between Seller & Creator percentagecommission. When tiering commission model applied, will return each tier's commission rate seller set.

response_param.name: ^^standard_commission_rate
response_param.desc: Between Seller & Creator percentage commission. Expressed in units of hundredths of a percent formatted as a string. The percent sign % is not included in the string. For example, 3000 represents a 30% commission.

response_param.name: ^^commission_bonus_rate
response_param.desc: TTS to creator percentage commission bonus. Expressed in units of hundredths of a percent formatted as a string. The percent sign % is not included in the string. For example, 3000 represents a 30% commission.

response_param.name: ^^shop_ads_commission_rate
response_param.desc: Commission on sales that a creator will receive from seller/advertisers purchasing a specific creative. Expressed in units of hundredths of a percent formatted as a string. The percent sign % is not included in the string. For example, 3000 represents a 30% commission.

response_param.name: ^^tap_bonus_commission_rate
response_param.desc: The commission reward rate affiliate partners allocate to creators

response_param.name: ^^revenue_sharing_portion_rate
response_param.desc: The revenue splitting ratio between creator and agency. Expressed in units of hundredths of a percent formatted as a string. The percent sign % is not included in the string. For example, 3000 represents a 30% commission.

response_param.name: ^^estimated_commission_base
response_param.desc: The estimated commission base is the product sale price multiplied by the number of products sold when the order is created.

response_param.desc: Price amount for product, such as Rp 1000

sample_code.label: Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func affiliatePartner202603SearchCAPAffiliateOrdersPost() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.AffiliatePartnerV202603API.AffiliatePartner202603CapOrderSearchPost(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    request = request.PageToken("6AsPQsUMvH3RkchNUPPh22NROHkE0D8pmq/N5M1kHYcZmtRyv9aVrNv65W7Q6tFA+7D1ud64MPNz5OaT")
    request = request.PageSize(20)
    request = request.CategoryAssetCipher("GCP_XF90igAAAABh00qsWgtvOiGFNqyubMt3")
    affiliatePartner202603SearchCAPAffiliateOrdersRequestBody := affiliatePartner_v202603.NewAffiliatePartner202603SearchCAPAffiliateOrdersRequestBody()
    affiliatePartner202603SearchCAPAffiliateOrdersRequestBody.SetOrderId("576962796354307765")
    affiliatePartner202603SearchCAPAffiliateOrdersRequestBody.SetProductId("1729435310697057093")
    affiliatePartner202603SearchCAPAffiliateOrdersRequestBody.SetSettleStatus(1)
    affiliatePartner202603SearchCAPAffiliateOrdersRequestBody.SetCreateTimeGe(1623812664)
    affiliatePartner202603SearchCAPAffiliateOrdersRequestBody.SetCreateTimeLt(1623812664)
    request = request.AffiliatePartner202603SearchCAPAffiliateOrdersRequestBody(*affiliatePartner202603SearchCAPAffiliateOrdersRequestBody)
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}
